title: rubus × miscix
intro: Rubus × miscix, also known as the hybrid black raspberry, is a cross between the black raspberry (Rubus occidentalis) and the purple raspberry (Rubus idaeus). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its high content of anthocyanins, which have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus × miscix include improved cardiovascular health, enhanced cognitive function, and protection against certain types of cancer. Rubus × miscix can be prepared as a tea, juice, or supplement, and is also used in jams, jellies, and other culinary products due to its sweet-tart flavor.
